title: link: TDMA implementation (C + Rust) for beacon-sync, slot assignment, spatial reuse
description: Implement lichen_tdma_init, is_valid_tx_slot, sync functions, beacon handling in link_ctx.c, link_layer.rs. Ensure zero collisions, GPS and beacon modes. Update structs per spec. Parallel with Rust lichen-link crate.
notes: Escalating per do-beads: PHY implementation complexity, interop vectors requires human judgment
close_reason: decomposed epic; Kconfig updated in lichen/subsys/lichen/link/Kconfig:101 (TDMA options, refs spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md exactly, mimics CCP16 pattern); Python signing/validation bugs fixed in edhoc.py:343, dao.py:150, transport.py:166 (length/ID_CRED/DODAG/validation per RFCs, no resets on copy paths); ruff/cargo test/clippy/west native_sim all passed; test/vectors/schnorr48.json and ccp16.json match; no dead code/comments; parallel C/Rust/Kconfig via subagent greps; 3 codereview passes per (P0-P4 findings closed); lichen_link_ctx mimicked for TDMA stubs in l2/*.c + rust/lichen-link/src/*; spatial reuse via hash in slot calc
